headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: We're tracking the latest news, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including what we're hearing ahead of Round 1 of the draft.

headlines.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
headlines.description: Here are the top highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast, from breaking news to the latest intel and reaction from around the NBA.

headlines.headline: NBA coaching carousel: Firings, hirings, what's next for each job
headlines.description: Dallas, Chicago, Orlando, New Orleans and Milwaukee have found their next coaches, while Portland's search continues. Here's what lies ahead for each franchise.

headlines.headline: Trail Blazers hire Wolves assistant Micah Nori as coach
headlines.description: The Trail Blazers have hired Micah Nori as the team's new head coach. Nori has spent the past five seasons as an assistant coach for the Wolves.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA mock draft machine: Simulate 60 picks over two rounds
headlines.description: Think you could do better than your team's GM? Now's your chance with our updated NBA mock draft machine.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA draft big board rankings: Top 100 prospects
headlines.description: Who made big jumps in the top 25? Where do Dybantsa and Peterson land? Here's our final big board of 2026.

headlines.headline: Cops investigate Jets QB Geno Smith after battery accusation
headlines.description: Jets quarterback Geno Smith is being investigated by police for an incident in which a woman accused him of battery.

headlines.headline: Fantasy football buzz: On which OTA standouts should managers buy the fantasy hype?
headlines.description: Mike Clay takes a look at some of the biggest offseason surprises that could hold fantasy value.

headlines.headline: 2026 Fantasy Football Draft Guide: Rankings, mock drafts and analysis
headlines.description: Your one-stop shop as you prep for draft season, including rankings, projections and analysis.

headlines.headline: Four ways to make fantasy football more fun
headlines.description: Want to add extra enjoyment to your fantasy league? Daniel Dopp offers a handful of ideas to spice things up.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL offseason: Judging biggest overreactions to moves
headlines.description: Do the Bengals have their best shot at a Super Bowl? Could the Texans pass on an extension for C.J. Stroud? We're sizing up five offseason overreactions.

headlines.headline: How Colts DT DeForest Buckner handled 'dark thoughts' postsurgery
headlines.description: It's not certain when the 32-year-old will be ready to play, but the goal is Week 1.

headlines.headline: Brady Tkachuk ready for next chapter with brother Matthew in Florida
headlines.description: Brady Tkachuk ready for next chapter with brother Matthew in Florida

headlines.headline: Oilers name Mike Babcock head coach after NHL clears way
headlines.description: Mike Babcock, who last coached the Maple Leafs before being fired in 2019, was officially named the next head coach of the Oilers on Tuesday.

headlines.headline: 2026 NHL draft: Buzz on prospects, trades, free agency
headlines.description: The first round is Friday. Our reporters pass along the latest intel they're hearing from around the league.

headlines.headline: Giannis Antetokounmpo latest athlete to suit up far from where they became stars
headlines.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo wearing a uniform that's not the Milwaukee Bucks' doesn't quite feel right? It wouldn't be the first time.

headlines.headline: Rod Brind'Amour not a part of Hockey Hall of Fame class
headlines.description: Hurricanes coach Rod Brind'Amour, 55, who led his club to the Stanley Cup title last week after captaining it to a championship in 2006 as a player, was not elected to the Hockey Hall of Fame on Monday and is not a part of the six-person 2026 class.

headlines.headline: Golden Knights owner Bill Foley launching NBA Las Vegas bid
headlines.description: Golden Knights founder and majority owner Bill Foley announced Monday that he is launching a bid to bring an NBA franchise to Las Vegas.
